items.title: Jacoby Brissett: Still absent, but dialogue ongoing
items.body_text: Brissett remains absent from the Cardinals' offseason program, but coach Mike LaFleur said Friday that the veteran quarterback has "played a lot of football, and we're in communication," Josh Weinfuss of ESPN.com reports. "He knows what the expectation is," LaFleur added. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Joe Burrow: Continuity on O, more help on D
items.body_text: Burrow was present for the start of Cincinnati's voluntary offseason workouts Thursday, Ben Baby of ESPN.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Breece Hall: Lands three-year extension
items.body_text: The Jets and Hall (knee) agreed to terms on a three-year, $45.75 million contract Friday, NFL reporter Jordan Schultz reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Jauan Jennings: Inks deal with Minnesota
items.body_text: Jennings and the Vikings agreed on a one-year, $13 million contract Thursday, Adam Schefter of ESPN reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Kyle Pitts: Locked in for 2026
items.body_text: Pitts signed his franchise tender with the Falcons for the 2026 season Thursday, Tom Pelissero of NFL Network reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
